(German pronunciation: [[ˈtʁuːdəʁɪŋ ˈʁiːm]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German"); [Central Bavarian](/wiki/Central_Bavarian "Central Bavarian"): *Trudaring-Ream*) is the 15th borough (German: *[Stadtbezirk](/wiki/Stadtbezirk "Stadtbezirk")*) of [Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich"), [Bavaria](/wiki/Bavaria "Bavaria"). It consists of the two quarters (German: *[Stadtteile](/wiki/Stadtteil "Stadtteil")*) [Trudering](/wiki/Trudering "Trudering") and Riem. The borough is the location of Munich's former airport, [Riem Airport](/wiki/Munich-Riem_Airport "Munich-Riem Airport").

**Trudering-Riem** (German pronunciation: [[ˈtʁuːdəʁɪŋ ˈʁiːm]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German"); [Central Bavarian](/wiki/Central_Bavarian "Central Bavarian"): *Trudaring-Ream*) is the 15th borough (German: *[Stadtbezirk](/wiki/Stadtbezirk "Stadtbezirk")*) of [Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich"), [Bavaria](/wiki/Bavaria "Bavaria"). It consists of the two quarters (German: *[Stadtteile](/wiki/Stadtteil "Stadtteil")*) [Trudering](/wiki/Trudering "Trudering") and Riem. The borough is the location of Munich's former airport, [Riem Airport](/wiki/Munich-Riem_Airport "Munich-Riem Airport").

## Location

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Trudering-Riem&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Location")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/88/Messe_M%C3%BCnchen.jpg/250px-Messe_M%C3%BCnchen.jpg)](/wiki/File:Messe_M%C3%BCnchen.jpg)

Messe Riem

In the north the borough borders [Bogenhausen](/wiki/Bogenhausen "Bogenhausen"), in the west the borough borders [Berg am Laim](/wiki/Berg_am_Laim "Berg am Laim"), in the south [Ramersdorf-Perlach](/wiki/Ramersdorf-Perlach "Ramersdorf-Perlach"), and in the east the municipalities [Aschheim](/wiki/Aschheim "Aschheim"), [Feldkirchen](/wiki/Feldkirchen,_Upper_Bavaria "Feldkirchen, Upper Bavaria"), [Haar](/wiki/Haar,_Bavaria "Haar, Bavaria") and [Putzbrunn](/wiki/Putzbrunn "Putzbrunn") (belonging to the [Munich district](/wiki/Munich_(district) "Munich (district)")).

The population is distributed roughly as follows: Trudering 56,000 and Riem 20,000.

There are the following subdistricts:

* Gartenstadt Trudering
* Kirchtrudering
* [Messestadt Riem](/wiki/Messestadt_Riem "Messestadt Riem")
* Moosfeld
* Neutrudering
* Riem
* Straßtrudering
* Waldtrudering

The old village center of *Riem* is situated around the church of St. Martin that lies in the street Martin-Empl-Ring. The old village center of *Kirchtrudering* is situated around the church St. Peter and Paul in the Kirchtruderinger Straße and the one of *Straßtrudering* at the junction of Truderinger Straße and Bajuwarenstraße.

The municipality of [Trudering](/wiki/Trudering "Trudering") was formed in 1818 by merging the villages of Kirchtrudering and Straßtrudering. At the beginning of the 20th century, new settlements emerged in the municipal area, such as Gartenstadt (garden city) Trudering, Waldtrudering and Neutrudering. Trudering has been part of Munich since 1932, and Riem since 1937.
